brainseg_brainsegvol: This is a whole-brain metadata measure with two possible labels, "BrainSeg_BrainSegVol" and "BrainSegVol". It comes from the stats/aseg file.
brainsegnotvent_brainsegvolnotvent: This is a whole-brain metadata measure with two possible labels, "BrainSegNotVent_BrainSegVolNotVent" and "BrainSegVolNotVent". It comes from the stats/aseg file.

cortex_meanthickness_lh: This is a whole-brain metadata measure with two possible labels, "Cortex_MeanThickness" and "MeanThickness". It comes from the stats/lh file.
cortex_meanthickness_rh: This is a whole-brain metadata measure with two possible labels, "Cortex_MeanThickness" and "MeanThickness". It comes from the stats/rh file.
cortex_numvert_lh: This is a whole-brain metadata measure with two possible labels, "Cortex_NumVert" and "NumVert". It comes from the stats/lh file.
cortex_numvert_rh: This is a whole-brain metadata measure with two possible labels, "Cortex_NumVert" and "NumVert". It comes from the stats/rh file.

cortex_pialsurfarea_rh: This is a whole-brain metadata measure with two possible labels, "Cortex_PialSurfArea" and "PialSurfArea". It comes from the stats/rh file.
estimatedtotalintracranialvol_etiv: This is a whole-brain metadata measure with two possible labels, "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol_eTIV" and "eTIV". It comes from the stats/aseg file.
lh_euler: Left hemisphere Euler number from recon-all.log
lh_holes: Left hemisphere number of holes from recon-all.log
